finding_results.notes: The signet beat and campfire close now land on image, silence, and refusal of the easy spend instead of post-scene moral paraphrase.
Dren's first read of Kem now tracks signet, clothes, and class behavior; the original chair line is preserved without repeating the Ch3 inventory.
Dren's first read of Vel now assesses route-readiness and practical competence rather than repeating her established face, hands, or pack signature.
Chapter-wide dash cleanup reduced em-dash lines to 1 of 113 prose lines, below the 10% ceiling.
Vague 'something' usage was cut to 1 instance in 3962 words, below the pass threshold.
Vel's campfire math now explicitly keeps her at 28, matching the continuity sheet and Chapter 8 opening budget.

Three interventions. (1) Vel's aphoristic 'That's what outside is for' replaced with flat 'Yeah.' — compressed acknowledgment that stays inside her practical register without producing a portable mentor line. The redirect to southern routes does the work. (2) Dren's Mira disclosure reworked from organized medical exposition into rougher bargaining speech: 'My girl's sick. Mira.' names her without staging, 'her legs —' self-interrupts before medical detail, cost arrives through trader logic ('she costs more than I've got. Every run I take is part of getting there') rather than tabulated math ('covers about half... scraping together run by run... maybe a quarter'). His indirectness about Mira is now character-true per style bible. (3) Dren's 'Lady' risk-diagnosis speech replaced with trade-pattern recognition: 'You're paying me double an eastern run to go south fast. I've been hauling cargo twenty years.' reads the customer's urgency from the price, which is how a trader identifies trouble — not through thematic pronouncement. The 'Great' speech shortened to 'So if they catch up, I'm the bastard standing next to him' — casual profanity integrated as connective tissue per Dren's profile, concrete self-assessment without elaboration.

Replaced the remaining "specific/specifically" constructions with concrete sensory or motive detail: the tavern smell, the keeper's labor-built forearms, Dren's visible money calculus, and Kem's strap-burn are now rendered directly. No "specific/specifically" usage remains in the chapter.

The cited narration beats now resolve as complete sentences or integrated clauses instead of clipped emphasis. An adjacent narration fragment at the keeper's first look toward Kem was also folded into full syntax to keep the same habit from resurfacing nearby.

pass_summaries.summary: Re-keyed the chapter's Ledger arithmetic to continuity, compressed the signet and campfire beats so they land on concrete shame and restraint rather than thematic summary, rewrote Dren's first read of Vel and Kem to avoid recycled cross-chapter inventories, and brought em-dash and 'something' density back under the packet limits.

Single finding addressed across three dialogue sites. Vel's aphorism cut to a flat acknowledgment. Dren's Mira disclosure fragmented through self-interruption and trader-cost logic instead of organized medical exposition. Dren's risk assessment recast as trade-pattern reading instead of polished thematic diagnosis. All must-land beats preserved: Mira named, economic cost visible through bargaining texture, signet payoff intact. No continuity changes; heading contract preserved.

Removed the chapter's remaining "specific/specifically" placeholder precision and recast the flagged clipped narration beats into full syntax without flattening Kem's discovery-driven voice or Dren's transactional scene pressure.

summary: Merged three-pass revision report (FIXED=10, PARTIAL=0, UNRESOLVED=0).
